description_long: This is a classic Nintendo Entertainment System (NES) controller, featuring a rectangular beige and black plastic body with rounded edges. The front face displays a black panel with a cross-shaped D-pad on the left, two red circular action buttons labeled 'A' and 'B' on the right, and two small rectangular 'Select' and 'Start' buttons in the center. The iconic 'Nintendo' logo is printed in red on the right side of the controller. A short, thick black cable extends from the top edge, used to connect the controller to the game console. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and faded areas, indicating frequent use. The controller is compact, lightweight, and designed to be held comfortably in both hands for gaming.
description: A rectangular, vintage Nintendo NES controller with a black and beige body, red buttons, and a connecting cable. The surface is worn, with visible controls and the Nintendo logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the D-pad, 'Select' and 'Start' buttons, and the two red 'A' and 'B' buttons, along with the Nintendo logo.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the thickness of the controller and the protruding cable at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the controller, the cable attachment, and the reverse side of the buttons.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the red buttons and the edge profile of the controller.
